subject: [PATCH pynfs v3 16/26] server41tests: test CHANGE_DIR_ATTRS notification

2026-06-19.patch_summary: This patch adds a new test to the server41tests suite, which verifies that the NFSv4.1 server sends a CHANGE_DIR_ATTRS notification when directory attributes are changed. The test creates a delegation and requests notifications for changes to directory attributes and file additions. It then creates a file from a second client and checks that the server sends the expected notification with the updated directory attributes.
